items.name: 咕噜鸭
items.description: 换上黑白礼服的嘴硬奶鸭，口头禅"嘎？这合理吗？"
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-1 pet: guluduck

items.name: 炎尾狐
items.description: 急性子的高个子奶狐，火焰尾巴比头还高，随情绪忽大忽小
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-1 pet: emberfox

items.name: 啾雷鼠
items.description: 巴掌大的迷你雷鼠，兴奋时会把静电传给别人
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-1 pet: voltmouse

items.name: 气泡鲸
items.description: 飘在半空的圆滚小鲸，慢性子乐天派，喷水柱里装着今天的心情
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-1 pet: bubblefrog

items.name: 嫩芽菇
items.description: 顶着比身体大三倍的菌帽，晒到太阳会不自觉左右摇摆
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-1 pet: sproutcap

items.name: 霜雪怪
items.description: 毛茸茸的壮实小雪怪，高冷话少，其实最怕别人不理它
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-1 pet: frostpeng

items.name: 雷霆鼠皇
items.description: 头戴静电王冠的胖鼠皇，打个哈欠都带雷声
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: thunderking

items.name: 电浆狐
items.description: 圆耳朵的狐狸，火焰尾里裹着一道噼啪电芯
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: plasmatanuki

items.name: 藤电鼠
items.description: 闪电尾上缠着发光藤蔓的小鼠，晒太阳就是充电
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: vinevolt

items.name: 极光貂
items.description: 皮毛流动着极光色彩的蓬毛小貂
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: auroramink

items.name: 闪光鸭
items.description: 羽毛噼啪带电的白鸭，摸头会被轻微电到
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: sparkduck

items.name: 雷雨鲸
items.description: 头顶自带一朵小雷雨云的发光电鲸
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: stormeel

items.name: 炎狱狐
items.description: 三条火焰尾的大狐狸，走过之处留下小小焦印
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: infernofox

items.name: 余烬菇
items.description: 帽檐永远燃着一线火星的蘑菇，自带炭火气
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: cinderleaf

items.name: 熔霜狼
items.description: 半身火纹半身冰纹的毛怪，冷热同体
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: thermowolf

items.name: 焰羽鸭
items.description: 呆毛烧成三簇小火苗的白鸭，尾巴是一撮狐火
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: blazeduck

items.name: 蒸汽鲸
items.description: 喷汽不喷水的温泉鲸，尾鳍尖上燃着小火
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: steamander

items.name: 菇林兽
items.description: 帽子上长着一整片小蘑菇林的温顺巨菇
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: mycobeast

items.name: 雪兔菇
items.description: 帽顶竖着两只雪绒"兔耳"的冻蘑菇，会织围巾
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: frostbunny

items.name: 苔羽鸭
items.description: 头顶小菇帽、背上长苔藓的悠闲鸭
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: mossduck

items.name: 莲叶鲸
items.description: 头顶莲叶帽、喷水口里长出嫩芽的池塘园丁
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: lotusturtle

items.name: 极冰雪帝
items.description: 披冰晶披风的雪怪皇帝，呼吸凝成雪花
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: glacierpeng

items.name: 霜羽鸭
items.description: 围着蓬蓬霜毛围脖的酷鸭，羽毛结着细霜
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: frostduck

items.name: 浮冰雪怪
items.description: 坐在随身小浮冰上的圆雪怪，尾巴是一片尾鳍
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: floeseal

items.name: 咕噜天鹅
items.description: 黑白礼服的优雅天鹅，激动时仍会"嘎"地破音
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: guluswan

items.name: 涟漪鸭
items.description: 尾巴变成小尾鳍的水灵鸭，走路自带涟漪光环
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: rippleduck

items.name: 浪涛鲸
items.description: 背驮一朵永不落下的浪花的大鲸，游过带起水雾
items.description_english: Gulugulu tier-2 pet: tidefrog

items.name: 焊花虫
items.description: 圆滚小甲虫，鞘翅是两块可开合的焊接面罩，屁股喷焊花；一丝不苟的工地老师傅
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (2-element): weldbug

items.name: 电叶猬
items.description: 小刺猬，背刺是一根根蓄电叶片，受惊全体炸毛发光；胆小但好奇心旺盛
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (2-element): voltquill

items.name: 极光鸮
items.description: 圆滚雪鸮，眉羽是两道小极光，尾羽拖极光丝带；熬夜观星的学者
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (2-element): aurowl

items.name: 静电兔
items.description: 长耳是两根天线、背插发条钥匙的小兔，蹦跳时耳尖冒电火；电量满格的话痨
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (2-element): zapbun

items.name: 雷海马
items.description: 直立漂浮小海马，卷尾缠着一朵小雷云，背鳍是均衡器光条；节奏感天生满分
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (2-element): voltmare

items.name: 火辣蜥
items.description: 低趴小蜥蜴，尾巴是一根卷曲红辣椒，背脊一排叶鳍；嗜辣暴脾气（但很小只）
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (2-element): chilizard

items.name: 温泉猴
items.description: 泡温泉的雪猴，左颊暖橘右颊霜蓝，头顶常年蒸汽；享受主义慢性子
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (2-element): onsenmonk

items.name: 烛焰羊
items.description: 奶白蜡质卷毛羊，呆毛是一撮烛火，情绪越高火越旺；温吞治愈系
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (2-element): waxlamb

items.name: 汽雾螈
items.description: 粉白六角螈，六根外鳃是噗噗冒汽的蒸汽管；笑眯眯的按部就班派
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (2-element): steamalotl

items.name: 雪松鹿
items.description: 细腿小鹿，角是两枝挂雪松枝，松绿短绒；安静的冬日邮差气质
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (2-element): pinefawn

items.name: 花盆龟
items.description: 龟壳是一只陶土花盆，盆里种着嫩芽，浇水会开小花；佛系园丁
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (2-element): potturtle

items.name: 荷叶蛙
items.description: 蹲坐小青蛙，头顶荷叶圆帽，喉囊鼓起像小荷苞；一下雨就开心
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (2-element): lilyfrog

items.name: 雪球熊
items.description: 站立圆雪球小白熊，围星星围巾，肚皮是软雪；冷链快递实习生，干劲十足
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (2-element): snowcub

items.name: 冰晶水母
items.description: 伞盖是一坨旋涡冰淇淋的小水母，触手是四根奶油卷；飘来飘去的甜品师
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (2-element): icejelly

items.name: 泡澡獭
items.description: 顺滑长身水獭，永远顶着一撮肥皂泡刘海；爱干净的社交达人
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (2-element): sudsotter

items.name: 烟花雀
items.description: 小孔雀，开屏即一面烟花：羽眼是火星、羽枝带电光、羽底叶纹；爱炫但业务过硬
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): pyrepeacock

items.name: 风暴龙
items.description: 面条身形的东方小龙，一角冒火一角结霜，背鬃是静电茸毛；云端气象员
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): stormdrake

items.name: 摇滚鸡
items.description: 大红摇滚公鸡，鸡冠是跳动火焰，尾羽三根闪电；嗓门大心肠软
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): rockrooster

items.name: 沸腾虾
items.description: 卷成 C 形的小虾，背壳是麻辣锅纹，长须带电；夜市摊主嗓门王
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): boilshrimp

items.name: 光蜂鸟
items.description: 拇指大的蜂鸟，翅膀振出极光残影，尾羽是冰晶叶；实验室里最快的观察员
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): glowhum

items.name: 风车鼹
items.description: 圆滚鼹鼠背着小风车背包，护目镜推在头顶；田园发电站站长
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): windmole

items.name: 流萤虫
items.description: 尾灯是暖黄小灯泡的萤火虫，叶形翅挂着露珠；夜班图书管理员
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): glowfly

items.name: 滑冰鹅
items.description: 圆企鹅，脚蹼是两片冰刀，围脖别着号码牌；冰壶馆全能选手
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): waddleskate

items.name: 霜灯鱼
items.description: 圆滚深海鮟鱇，头顶钓竿挑着闪电灯泡，冰牙软糯无害；夜班巡逻员
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): frostangler

items.name: 信使鸽
items.description: 灰白信鸽挎云朵邮包，护目镜带电光；使命必达急性子
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): maildove

items.name: 四季龙
items.description: 变色龙，身体三段花色（焰橙/叶绿/霜蓝）随心情流动，卷尾是调色环；艺术家脾气
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): seasonleon

items.name: 暖包豚
items.description: 方砖体型水豚，头顶吐司帽，尾巴是麦穗；面包房定海神针，处变不惊
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): toastybara

items.name: 啵茶鸟
items.description: 奶茶粉火烈鸟单腿站立，脖颈弯成吸管弧度，腿挂珍珠脚环；下午茶宣传大使
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): bobamingo

items.name: 拿铁雪人
items.description: 两段式雪人，胸口嵌温热咖啡心，头顶奶泡贝雷帽；咖啡店店长，字面意义外冷内热
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): lattegolem

items.name: 桑拿豚
items.description: 圆滚河豚，鼓气喷蒸汽、泄气飘雪粒，刺是软桑拿木钉；呼吸自成节奏
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): saunapuff

items.name: 拉面熊
items.description: 小浣熊顶着冒热气的拉面碗帽，尾环纹像叉烧卷；深夜食堂主厨
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): ramencoon

items.name: 毛线猫
items.description: 蜷成毛线球的猫，只露耳朵尾巴，冰蓝×叶绿双股线；织补铺看板猫，懒得可爱
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): yarncat

items.name: 苔壳蜗
items.description: 蜗牛壳是玻璃冰花房，壳里飘微型雪、养一株小绿植；移动温室管理员
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): terrasnail

items.name: 稻草人
items.description: 田间稻草人小神，草帽垂稻穗，袖口漏新芽；守田的老好人
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): scaresprout

items.name: 冰海象
items.description: 敦实小海象，獠牙是保龄球瓶纹，肚皮球道条纹；冰上保龄球馆馆长
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (3-element): bowlrus

items.name: 舞龙灯
items.description: 纸扎小龙灯，灯身四段各透一色元素光，竹篾骨架流苏尾；节庆巡游台柱
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (4-element): lanternloong

items.name: 摇摆葵
items.description: 会走的向日葵，花盘是镭射唱片纹，花瓣火橙电黄相间；夜场主唱
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (4-element): discobloom

items.name: 蜜壶草
items.description: 圆滚猪笼草，笼身是果汁杯、插藤蔓吸管，笼盖小草帽；果汁摊摊主
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (4-element): juicepitcher

items.name: 爆浆糬
items.description: 雪白年糕团子，烤到微鼓会"啵"地弹起，头插仙女棒；跨年夜限定艺人
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (4-element): mochipop

items.name: 云章鱼
items.description: 骑在自己云朵上的小章鱼，四触手各拎一种天气；气象台外景主播
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (4-element): meteoropus

items.name: 烧烤鳄
items.description: 低趴长身小鳄，背鳞是一排冒火光的烤炉格栅，尾拴灯串；夜市烧烤扛把子
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (4-element): grillgator

items.name: 风铃草
items.description: 倒挂风铃草精灵，花铃结冰晶铃舌，风过叮咚带电微光；禅意音疗师
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (4-element): chimebell

items.name: 海天使
items.description: 半透明冰蓝海天使，小翅拍出极光涟漪，胸口一点叶绿心；安静的深海诗人
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (4-element): frostclione

items.name: 谷雨牛
items.description: 青灰小水牛，角间挂一串算珠，背上一小片自带细雨的稻云；算账最快的老会计
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (4-element): mistyox

items.name: 潜艇蟹
items.description: 寄居蟹背着黄色小潜水艇当壳，潜望镜从壳顶伸出；深海快递潜航员
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (4-element): subhermit

items.name: 抹茶貘
items.description: 圆滚食梦貘，长鼻是茶壶嘴，呼出的梦是茶香白雾；睡觉即本职工作的茶艺师
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (4-element): teapir

items.name: 炼药蝠
items.description: 圆耳小蝙蝠，翅膜内衬四色药剂分层纹，总倒挂着摇瓶子；炼金夜班学徒
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (4-element): brewbat

items.name: 掌勺猪
items.description: 圆成汤圆的小猪，厨师帽永远歪着，围裙四色酱渍；农家乐大厨，尝菜比做菜多
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (4-element): porkchef

items.name: 泡汤豚
items.description: 奶白小海豚，背鳍挂温泉旅馆门帘，额顶小毛巾；旅馆女将，鞠躬弧度完美
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (4-element): spadolphin

items.name: 雪盆栽
items.description: 会走路的雪松盆景，枝上积雪终年不化，盆沿结冰棱花边；自称百岁的园艺大师
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (4-element): snowbonsai

items.name: 醒狮
items.description: 节庆舞狮，狮头五彩流苏对应五元素、额镜眨眼会响铃；揭幕仪式专业户
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (5-element): liondance

items.name: 灵角兽
items.description: 小独角兽，鬃毛是流动的五元素光带，独角是水晶塔罗签；占卜从不失手（因为只说好话）
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (5-element): manacorn

items.name: 女王蜂
items.description: 蜂后，五瓣花冠冠冕，腹纹五色渐变环，翅膀振出音浪纹；乐团首席指挥
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (5-element): queenbuzz

items.name: 石像咕
items.description: 胖石像鬼，石翅内衬四色元素纹，自带小石柱平台；城市天台导游
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (5-element): gargoylite

items.name: 琉璃蜓
items.description: 蜻蜓，四片翅膀是四色雕花玻璃，尾灯一点星光；湿地自然观察员
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (5-element): crystalwing

items.name: 赤陶甲
items.description: 穿山甲，鳞片是一片片上釉陶瓦、五色釉彩；古法窑厂传人，慢工出细活
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (5-element): claypango

items.name: 晶麒麟
items.description: 六棱水晶角小麒麟，鬃与尾是六色流光，蹄踏云纹光环，背脊浮六枚元素徽；全谱旗舰，登场自带 BGM（自己哼的）
items.description_english: Gulugulu fixed species (6-element): prismkirin
